query: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.viewCount, n.downloadCount, n.categoryId, c.name as categoryName, n.subjectId, s.name as subjectName FROM notebooks n LEFT JOIN content_categories c ON n.categoryId = c.id LEFT JOIN subjects s ON n.subjectId = s.id WHERE n.isPublished = 1 AND (n.previewUrl IS NOT NULL OR n.fileUrl IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY n.viewCount DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ocoPq9UKt9MVUJb.root --database cF5vY7QXosm6HAcTf29xyM --execute SELECT n.id, n.title, n.viewCount, n.downloadCount, n.categoryId, c.name as categoryName, n.subjectId, s.name as subjectName FROM notebooks n LEFT JOIN content_categories c ON n.categoryId = c.id LEFT JOIN subjects s ON n.subjectId = s.id WHERE n.isPublished = 1 AND (n.previewUrl IS NOT NULL OR n.fileUrl IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY n.viewCount DESC LIMIT 15;
